notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Darell Hernaiz singles on a ground ball to second baseman Nick Loftin. Nick Kurtz scores. Darell Hernaiz to 2nd. Darell Hernaiz advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Nick Loftin.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Darell Hernaiz singles on a ground ball to second baseman Nick Loftin. Nick Kurtz scores. Darell Hernaiz to 2nd. Darell Hernaiz advances to 2nd, on a throwing error by second baseman Nick Loftin.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas plunked
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas hit by pitch. Bobby Witt Jr. to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Jac Caglianone pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jac Caglianone singles on a ground ball to third baseman Darell Hernaiz.

notableEvents.label: Vinnie Pasquantino pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Vinnie Pasquantino lines out sharply to center fielder Zack Gelof.

notableEvents.label: Jeff McNeil pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil grounds into a force out, second baseman Michael Massey to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. Shea Langeliers to 3rd. Nick Kurtz out at 2nd. Jeff McNeil to 1st.
